privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated demo data within the TimeTrex environment. The required values for the new expense policy name ('Mileage Reimbursement'), employee first name ('John'), employee last name ('Doe'), reimbursement amount (97.15), and date ('2026-03-04') exactly match the instructions in the task description and are explicitly required by the setup and export scripts.
